_comment: Meridian Financial — fictional device posture policy. Maps to Cloudflare Access posture checks and Tailscale ACL tags. For Lab 03 analysis only.

corp-managed.description: Corporate-issued, domain-joined Windows or macOS device, fully managed

required_checks.rationale: Minimum CrowdStrike ZTA score; below 70 indicates missing sensor components or policy violations
Ensures OS is within supported patch window; older builds indicate failed patch management
Data at rest protection required by PCI-DSS and SOX; unencrypted disk is an unacceptable data exposure risk
Host-based firewall reduces lateral movement risk on untrusted networks
Unattended session risk on shared or office environments

contractor-byod.description: Contractor personal device — BYOD, no corporate MDM enrollment

required_checks.rationale: WARP client provides minimum device signal for BYOD; without it there is no device posture signal at all
Minimum supportable OS for Cloudflare WARP; older versions have known exploited vulnerabilities

contractor-byod.cloudflare_access_policy: require WARP enrollment + user identity; deny access to financial systems
contractor-byod.notes: Contractors may not access core banking, SWIFT gateway, or any PCI-DSS cardholder data environment regardless of posture score

default_posture.description: Devices with no registered posture signal
default_posture.rationale: No posture signal = no access. This is the Zero Trust default: deny unless posture is verified, not trust unless posture fails.
